# GetGood — Learn Anything Fast
> Structured 10-step guides for getting good at anything in under a day. Each guide shows noticeable results in under a minute and achievable mastery within a day.

## About
GetGood provides concise, actionable how-to guides built around a single principle: the fastest path to competence. Each guide contains exactly 10 steps, a realistic time-to-notice (under 60 seconds), and a time-to-achieve (1 day or less), with embedded reference media.

## Guides

- [How to Do a Perfect Push-Up](https://getgood.page/guide/perfect-pushup): Master push-up form with proper hand placement, body alignment, and breathing technique. No injury, maximum results.

- [How to Chop an Onion Fast (Without Crying)](https://getgood.page/guide/chop-onion): The chef's dice technique — horizontal cuts, vertical cuts, cross-cuts. Sharp knife, root anchor, no tears.

- [How to Hit a Consistent Tennis Serve](https://getgood.page/guide/tennis-serve): Continental grip, trophy position, leg drive, pronation at contact. Consistency before power.

- [How to Play Chess Openings Correctly](https://getgood.page/guide/chess-openings): Control the center, develop knights before bishops, castle early, never bring the queen out too soon.

- [How to Start Touch Typing](https://getgood.page/guide/touch-typing): Home row anchor, finger assignment, no peeking, accuracy over speed. From hunt-and-peck to 60+ WPM.

- [How to Remember Names Instantly](https://getgood.page/guide/memorise-names): Attention, repetition, visual association, face anchoring. Forgetting names is an attention problem, not a memory problem.

- [How to Run With Better Form](https://getgood.page/guide/running-form): Run tall, land under hips, 170-180 cadence, wrist arms, relax hands and face. Reduce injury, run further.

- [How to Make a Perfect Poached Egg](https://getgood.page/guide/poached-egg): Fresh eggs, gentle simmer, white vinegar, ramekin entry, 3-minute timer. Restaurant quality at home.

- [How to Hold a Guitar Pick Correctly](https://getgood.page/guide/guitar-pick): Medium pick, side of index finger, thumb pad, 45-degree angle, wrist motion, alternate picking from day one.

- [How to Take Better Photos (Rule of Thirds)](https://getgood.page/guide/rule-of-thirds): Grid overlay, four power points, horizon placement, leading space, leading lines. Instant composition upgrade.

## Categories
- Sports & Fitness: /category/sports-fitness
- Food & Cooking: /category/food-cooking
- Music: /category/music
- Games & Strategy: /category/games-strategy
- Tech & Tools: /category/tech-tools
- Social & Communication: /category/social-communication
